comments.text: Today, Illinois marks a milestone in the Brandon Road Interbasin Project with the acquisition of the land needed for construction. Thanks to Midwest Generation for their partnership, the millions in the Great Lakes region who rely on this ecosystem will continue to be protected.

PUPPY!!!! Muppy and Terrover are the Lucario or Zoroark of my region; rare canine Pokémon that would feature prominently in the marketing, anime and movies surrounding the hypothetical games! 🐶 Part of my Great Lakes fakemon pokedex project!
I would pay one hundred dollars to hear trump talk extemporaneously for five minutes about keeping invasive Asian carp out of the Great Lakes. I would love to see where that goes.

Listen: From fish that can survive in a stream just a few inches deep to fish that survive in the depths of Lake Michigan, “Fishes of the Chicago Region” serves to “expand your imagination," says outdoor columnist Dale Bowman. www.wbez.org/reset-with-s...
After decades, lake trout restored to sustainable levels in Lake Superior #GreatLakes www.wmuk.org/2024-11-20/a...
If we can defund the dept of education and cancer research and dept of ‘get rid of fucking carp from Great Lakes,’ we can defund ICE and the DHS.
Fish and chips, Great Lakes style. Featuring world famous Little Bay de Noc lake perch caught earlier today. And it is ridiculously good. 🍽️ #mymichigan #906Life
My Great Lakes Great Egret is back, fishing must be good. #906Life #puremichigan

This one goes out to the Army Corp of Engineers Chicago district as active construction resumes on deterrents at Brandon Roads Lock and Dam to keep Asian Carp out of the Great Lakes. This is critical for lake health and fisheries 🌊🌊
They say you should eat more fish for your health..but maybe not THAT much? Commission for .bsky.social #transformation #furryart

See also: Great Lakes. Some of the best fish I ever ate came from the Great Lakes. When I bought it, it came with a warning that I didn’t notice until after I ate it- the recommended intake was one fish a YEAR. Cuz pollution was so bad in Great Lakes, it made fish little poison fillets.

It's beginning to look a lot like #Fishmas! 🐟🎄 That's right - #25DaysofFishmas will be on Bluesky this year! As in past years, I'll be highlighting a different #GreatLakes fish species each day in December, advent calendar-style. The 9th (!) year of #Fishmas kicks off December 1!
$20 they gonna accidentally turn off the USACE electricification station keeping the Asian carp out of Lake Michigan

Bayfront Park in Petoskey sometimes has monsters swimming in the creeks and rivers that flow into Lake Michigan. King Salmon smolts are born or released into those flowing waterways and leave to the big lake for 2 to 4 years before returning to spawn and produce the next generation.
Sept 3, 2020
The US government has a billion-dollar plan to stop carp from invading the Great Lakes

Fresh, still swimming as of this morning lake perch from Northwest Lake Michigan. There is nothing finer to eat in the lake than fresh Lake perch. And they are starting to come into shallower water making this a great time of year to fish for them. #906Life #PureMichigan

He's baaaack. Apparently his fishing success was so good yesterday that my great egret friend came back for more this morning. You sure don't see too many great egrets on Lake Michigan. #906Life #PureMichigan
Found some fat trout today. Great Lakes steelhead are in! [Fly fishing in Wisconsin]
Illinois Gov. JB Pritzker is delaying a massive project to help stop invasive carp from entering the Great Lakes, citing Trump for withholding federal funds.
Fresh Little Bay de Noc Lake perch for lunch is as good as it gets. The Bays de Noc are bays on the northwest corner of Lake Michigan and the fishing is fantastic. #906Life #mymichigan 🍽️
My Great Lakes Great Egret is back for some more great fishing here on the northwest corner of Lake Michigan this morning. #906Life #PureMichigan

🎶Chestnuts roasting on an open fire, Jack Fish nipping at your nose 🎶 Day 3’s #Fishmas feature is a species that wouldn’t be out of place at the North Pole! The Northern Pike (Esox lucius), also known in Canada as jackfish, is a popular catch across the #GreatLakes and beyond #25DaysofFishmas

That’s no Ghost of #Fishmas Past! 👻 Day 19 features the Lake Sturgeon (Acipenser fulvescens), also known as by the Ojibwe names of Nmé/Nahmay, a prehistoric-looking #GreatLakes fish species whose story of resilience could rival any Dickens novel #25DaysofFishmas
For #GarWeek, here is a juvenile gar from southern Green Bay that we encountered this summer. Look that those pectoral fins go! After length measurement, this fish was released on site. #GreatLakes

Still so weird seeing a great egret stalking bait fish on the northwestern corner of Lake Michigan. Even though this guy's been coming by here three or four times a day now to feed his growing family. #906Life #PureMichigan #birds 🪿

#ResistanceEarth
#BlueEarth Whitefish have long been a part of Great Lakes cuisine and culture, but the iconic fish are disappearing. Invasive mussels have filtered away zooplankton that whitefish depend on. If the whitefish collapse, it will impact other species. www.bridgemi.com/michigan-env...

Yippee-Ki-Yi, Master Fisher: no need to die hard this #Fishmas season because the Kiyi (Coregonus kiyi) is here to save the day - or at least slightly improve it! Part of a group of #GreatLakes whitefishes known as Ciscoes, the deepwater-dwelling Kiyi is the star of #25DaysofFishmas Day 4!

Prepare for trouble and make it double, because #Fishmas Day 8 brings one fish with two identities! Steelhead + Rainbow Trout are the same species - Oncorhynchus mykiss - with different lifestyles. While not native to the #GreatLakes, they're a favorite of anglers #SundayFishSketch #25DaysofFishmas

You don’t want to be spotted without the holiday season’s hottest accessory - spots! Dressed to impress with its namesake coloration, Day 18’s #Fishmas feature the Spotted Gar (Lepisosteus oculatus) might be the most stylish of the #GreatLakes gar species - no ugly holiday sweaters here! #GarWeek

Grab the bull(head) by the horns on Day 2 of #25DaysofFishmas because it's time for the black bullhead (Ameiurus melas) to shine! The second day of #Fishmas brings a cool cat - one of several species of catfishes on the prowl throughout the #GreatLakes 🐈🐟

🎶 I’ll have a blue #Fishmas without you...🎶 I’d definitely be blue celebrating #25DaysofFishmas without the Bluegill (Lepomis macrochirus), one of the #GreatLakes region’s most recognizable (and catchable 🎣) fishes!

Rudolph the Red-nose…Shiner? 🔴🦌 Red Shiner (Cyprinella lutrensis) - also called Red Horse Minnow or Rainbow Dace - leads us into #25DaysofFishmas Day 15 not with a nose so bright but with a cautionary tale of a potentially invasive species in the #GreatLakes (+ is the answer to #SundayFishSketch!)

Scientists are fighting back against invasive zebra and quagga mussels in Lake Michigan. #906Life #mymichigan
www.jsonline.com/story/news/l...
In our #PictureOfTheWeek, invasive carp exposed to an electric shock leap out of the Illinois River. Now, a new and contentious plan aims to keep the fish out of the Great Lakes: buff.ly/avmUipw

And with that, Year 9 of #25DaysofFishmas is complete! Thank you to everyone who's followed along and shared these silly (and occasionally interesting) posts about #GreatLakes fish. I hope you have the chance to celebrate the amazing world just under the water's surface all year long!

Shortnose gar is one of 3 gar species found in the #GreatLakes region; the others being longnose + spotted gar. Shortnose - whose scientific name "platostomus" means "broad mouth" - is distinguished by a short (relative to the others) + broad snout (surprise!) as well as fewer spots #25DaysofFishmas
Decline of whitefish in Lake Michigan sparks fears that the fish might disappear The commercial harvest of the fish has declined nearly 90 percent since 1999 #GreatLakes www.wpr.org/news/decline...

This is devastating, how quagga mussels are single-handedly destroying the Great Lakes. Introduced by foreign ships that didn't empty their bilge before coming into the Great Lakes 🤬 #906Life #MyMichigan www.wpr.org/environment/...

#Fishmas Day is here at last, so break out the candy canes because Day 25 is all about the stripes - the Striped Shiner (Luxilus chrysocephalus), that is! We end this year's #GreatLakes #25DaysofFishmas by shining some light on a small fish who’s not often in the spotlight ✨

🎶I’m dreaming of a white #Fishmas…🎶 If you're dreaming of snow and cold this winter, you're in good company - the Pygmy Whitefish (Prosopium coulterii), is a small, little-known fish adapted for life in cold and dark environments like the deepest parts of Lake Superior #25DaysofFishmas ❄️

Decades ago, non-native carp escaped into the Illinois River, wreaking havoc on the ecosystem. Now, a proposed project that’s both expensive and contentious aims to keep the fish out of the Great Lakes. 🐟

All that glitters is not gold ✨ Despite the name - even the scientific name “auratus” means “gilded” - goldfish coloration can vary from the typical bright orange to olive/tan. Those found in the wild are often a muted olive-brown (though you may still see some bright orange ones!) #25DaysofFishmas

Anticipating a lack of federal funding under the new presidential administration, Illinois has postponed construction in a long-awaited $1.15 billion project to stop the movement of invasive carp up Illinois waterways and into Lake Michigan.

🎶From Atlantic to Pacific, gee the fish facts are terrific!🎶 #25DaysofFishmas is hitting the road! While there's no place like H.O.M.E.S. for the holidays, we'll be traveling beyond the #GreatLakes this year to learn about freshwater fishes from across the US. The road trip kicks off December 1!

Why the long face? Even though #GarWeek is coming to a close, there’s still plenty of #Fishmas fun to be had! Finish hanging up the GAR-land on Day 22 of #25DaysofFishmas with the Longnose Gar (Lepisosteus osseus), one of the most distinctive and cool-looking fishes in the #GreatLakes
Spring is here and the suckers are running. Here are the big two Great Lakes migratory sucker species, white and longnose. #sundayfishsketch
A little late #SundayFishSketch with some fish observed last week. #GreatLakes
I love fishing. First time out on Lake Ontario. Got me a Lake Trout. Tossed ‘em back in. We got a King Salmon as well!
A giant infrastructure project aims to block invasive carp from entering the Great Lakes. It's both expensive and contentious: buff.ly/kwCdX4T

Last day of #Fishmas - perhaps the most beautiful sport fish on earth: the Arctic grayling. Iridescent rainbow colors with a huge sail-shaped dorsal fin. This fish is Santa's neighbor, living as far north as Northern Canada and Alaska, and south to the Great Lakes and Montana. Merry Christmas! 🐟

Need help wrapping your #Fishmas gifts? Maybe the BOWfin (Amia ocellicauda) can lend a fin! 🎁 Also known as the dogfish, this #GreatLakes native species is not as scary as it may look - one might even say that they’re all bark and no bite (unless you’re a small fish, of course) 🐶 #25DaysofFishmas

I lived in Michigan for over twenty years before I found out salmon run up the Grand River from Lake Michigan. Here’s a coho navigating the fish ladder right in downtown Grand Rapids. It’s going the wrong way on that jump but it’ll figure it out. Sept 7, 2014

Just to be clear, invasive carp do pose a significant threat to the #GreatLakes and we need to continue taking action to prevent their introduction, but they're not yet "rapidly taking over Lake Michigan" as the president claimed in a social media post yesterday www.woodtv.com/news/michiga...
Because I can't deal with all this stuff right now, here is a bowl of lake whitefish chowder that I made! #GreatLakes

I was pregnant and advised not to eat fish from Michigan because of the high levels of mercury. Traveling in Ohio I asked a waitress where the fish was from. That I couldn’t have fish from the five lakes. She said that’s ok the fish is from Lake Erie …
Fresh Little Bay de Noc lake perch. The bay is in the extreme Northwest corner of Lake Michigan. Pan-Fried and I'm keeping it simple with a homemade fried rice. 🍽️ #mymichigan

Pritzker Delays $1.2B Invasive Carp Project Over Concerns Trump Won't Cover Federal Share: Illinois Gov. J.B. Pritzker has decided to delay work on a $1.2 billion project meant to prevent invasive carp from reaching the Great Lakes out of concerns that the Trump administration won't pay the federal…
There are at least thirty fishing boats I can see on Lake Superior
Here in the Great Lakes Midwest you can tell your age to the month by how interested you are in next Friday’s fish fry
One Man's Trash: Great Lakes Freshwater Drum on the Fly A handful of forward-thinking guides and anglers are developing incredible programs to target them. www.flyfisherman.com/editorial/gr...
